title: The First Meeting
description: Aditya, Deepak, Abhishek and Raghavendra begin discussing the idea that would become Mitra Mandal.

title: Birth of Mitra Mandal
description: The community group is officially established beneath the banyan tree.

title: First Public Initiative
description: Mitra Mandal launches its first social service projects.

title: Regional Recognition
description: The movement expands beyond its village and gains district-level recognition.

title: Rise of Nandini
description: Nandini emerges as one of the most influential voices in the organization.

title: Entering Politics
description: Mitra Mandal officially enters electoral politics.

title: First Electoral Victory
description: The movement wins its first major election.

title: National Expansion
description: Mitra Mandal becomes a nationwide force.

title: Mahendra Rathod Conflict
description: The greatest political rivalry in movement history reaches its peak.

title: The Golden Age
description: Membership reaches millions and Mitra Mandal enters its most successful era.

title: Rise of Aarohi and Arjun
description: The next generation begins taking leadership roles.

title: Death of Aditya
description: The Founder dies, marking the end of the first chapter of Mitra Mandal history.

title: The Empty Chair Preserved
description: The Empty Chair becomes an official symbol of the movement.

title: The Forgotten Founder Revealed
description: Raghavendra Solanki is rediscovered by history.

title: Rise of Mira
description: Mira becomes the bridge between generations.

title: The New Generation
description: Kabir, Anaya, Diya and Armaan become the dominant figures.

title: The Fracture
description: Ideological divisions begin to emerge within Mitra Mandal.

title: Aditya Becomes Myth
description: The founder evolves from historical figure into national legend.

title: Death of Aarav
description: The bridge between generations is lost.

title: Global Expansion
description: Mitra Mandal becomes an international institution.

title: Kabir's Final Speech
description: Kabir delivers his famous message: Let the future win.

title: Death of Mira
description: The Historian passes responsibility to Rukma.

title: The Empty Chair Crisis
description: A proposal attempts to remove the Empty Chair. The proposal fails.

title: The Founder Becomes Civilizational
description: Aditya's ideas become part of national and global culture.

title: The Republic of Questions
description: Kabir's writings become globally influential.

title: The Aditya Model
description: An AI archive recreates the writings and philosophy of Aditya Saini.

title: The Inheritor
description: Leadership passes to an ordinary teacher rather than a dynasty.

title: The Final Gathering
description: The remaining guardians meet beneath the banyan tree.

title: The Founder Becomes Timeless
description: Aditya becomes a civilizational figure studied worldwide.

title: The Empty Chair Endures
description: After 150 years, the Empty Chair remains untouched.

title: The Last Sunset
description: The saga ends beneath the banyan tree where it began.
